plugins.changelogTitle:
# Changelog

All notable changes to feelc are documented here. This file is generated by
[semantic-release](https://github.com/semantic-release/semantic-release) from the
[Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) on `main`.

plugins.publishCmd: if ! git rev-parse -q --verify refs/tags/v${nextRelease.version} >/dev/null; then git tag v${nextRelease.version} && git push origin v${nextRelease.version}; fi && goreleaser release --clean --skip=publish && bash scripts/release-publish.sh ${nextRelease.version}
